name: Finger Touch

inputs.name: Detect
inputs.description: Choose "Touch 0" to detect the first touch; choose "Touch 1" to detect the second touch

outputs.name: Idle
outputs.description: Execute the next node when no finger touch detected on the device screen

outputs.name: On Start
outputs.description: Execute the next node as soon as someone's finger touches the device screen

outputs.name: Stay
outputs.description: Execute the next node when someone's finger stays on the device screen

outputs.name: On Stop
outputs.description: Execute the next node as soon as someone's finger leaves the device screen

outputs.name: Current Position
outputs.description: The position of tapping point in the current frame. If the node execution is Idle (no touch detected), this position returns (-1, -1).

outputs.name: Last Updated
outputs.description: The position of last updated tapping point

description: Take different executions when the device screen is touched by one and/or two finger and when it is not touched.
